gist.headline: Puzzel Math joins the hive
gist.blurb: Puzzel Math just sprouted in our community greenhouse. It's a clever new app using Pollinations to help kids learn math through interactive mini-games.
gist.summary: Added Puzzel Math, an interactive educational app for elementary students, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: The community directory now features a new example of Pollinations being used to power educational tools and mini-games.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about a kids' math app called 'Puzzel Math'. Visuals should include math symbols (plus, minus, numbers), puzzle pieces, and a playful/educational vibe. Polly the bee could be wearing glasses or holding a pointer, teaching or solving a math puzzle with the robot.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing tiny teacher glasses, solving a jigsaw puzzle made of glowing math symbols and numbers. A cute chunky robot companion holds up a flashcard with a plus sign. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and educational.
